sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF Options Spot-On: On January 20th, 163.37K Contracts Were Traded, With 4.45 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On January 20th, the KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF (KWEB.US) experienced significant options trading activity, with 163.37K contracts traded. Call options constituted 75.52% of these transactions. The open interest for KWEB.US stood at approximately 4.45 million contracts, representing a notable increase of 113.91% compared to the 30-day average, indicating strong investor interest.

feed.title: Credicorp Ltd.: Tenpo Becomes Chile’s First Neobank After Receiving a Banking License
feed.summary: Credicorp Ltd.'s subsidiary, Tenpo, has received its operating authorization from Chile's financial markets regulator, becoming the first licensed neobank in the country. This milestone allows Tenpo to offer core banking products like checking accounts, consumer loans, and term deposits, expanding its services to its 2.5 million users. The move is hailed as a landmark for Chile's financial ecosystem, promoting financial inclusion and innovation.

feed.title: US Senate committee to hold ticket pricing hearing with Kid Rock, Live Nation exec
feed.summary: A U.S. Senate Commerce panel will hold a hearing next week to address unfair ticketing issues, featuring an executive from Ticketmaster-parent company Live Nation and entertainer Kid Rock. The hearing will also cover the FTC suit against Ticketmaster, all-in pricing, and other consumer protection concerns, following a lawsuit filed by the Justice Department and several state attorneys general against Live Nation Entertainment and Ticketmaster in 2024 for alleged monopolistic practices.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Announces Fiscal Year 2026 Quarterly Earnings Schedule
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial, Inc. has announced its expected earnings release dates and conference call information for all four quarters of fiscal year 2026. Financial results will be released at approximately 4:15 p.m. ET, with live conference calls beginning at 5:00 p.m. ET on specified dates in January, April, July, and October. Further details, including webcast and dial-in information, will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Option Care Health to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Host Conference Call
feed.summary: Option Care Health Inc. (NASDAQ: OPCH) will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 24, 2026, before market open. The company's management will host a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. E.T. to discuss the results, with registration and webcast details provided for interested participants.

feed.title: PayPal (PYPL) Stock Jumps As Trump Shelves Tariff Threat
feed.summary: PayPal (PYPL) stock surged after President Trump announced via social media that he would not impose tariffs scheduled for February 1st, easing fears of transatlantic trade wars. This decision is particularly beneficial for PayPal, which relies heavily on cross-border transactions, especially with Europe. Despite a generally bearish trend in stock performance over the past year, the removal of tariff uncertainty coupled with an oversold RSI and upcoming earnings report with positive estimates could signal a potential short-term rebound for the company.

feed.title: Waste Management Downgraded to Sector Perform with $250 Price Target
feed.summary: Scotiabank downgraded Waste Management (WM) to Sector Perform with a $250 price target, citing its outperformance against peers and closing valuation gaps. Despite facing tough organic growth comparisons this year, particularly due to last year's wildfires, WM's long-term growth outlook remains attractive, bolstered by Stericycle synergies. The company's financial health is strong, supported by an estimated $3.8 billion in free cash flow for 2026 and a resumed $3 billion share buyback authorization.

feed.title: Pipeline operator ONEOK boosts dividend 4%, paying $4.28 a year
feed.summary: ONEOK Inc. (NYSE: OKE) has announced a 4% increase in its quarterly dividend, raising it to $1.07 per share, an annualized dividend of $4.28 per share. The dividend is payable on February 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 2, 2026. This move reinforces ONEOK's position as a significant midstream operator with a vast 60,000-mile pipeline network.

feed.title: UDR Reports Tax Treatment of 2025 Distributions
feed.summary: UDR, Inc. (NYSE: UDR) has reported the tax treatment for its 2025 distributions paid to shareholders, providing detailed breakdowns for both common and preferred shares (Series E) relevant to Form 1099-DIV. The report includes information on ordinary dividends, capital gains, and nondividend distributions, along with additional disclosures for Section 1061 of the Internal Revenue Code. Shareholders are advised to consult with their tax advisors as the information is based on the best available data and state/local tax treatments may vary.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land sets Feb. 18–19 dates to release 2025 results
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE: TPL) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results after market close on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. This will be followed by a conference call on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company is a major landowner in Texas, primarily in the Permian Basin, generating revenue from various land-use activities and royalty interests.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Announces Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) will host its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings conference call on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company will release its financial results for the period ending December 31, 2025, before the market opens that day. A live webcast and supplemental information will be available on their investor relations website, and a replay will be accessible for one year.

feed.title: S&P 500 supplier Martin Marietta sets Feb. 11 call on 2025 results
feed.summary: Martin Marietta (NYSE: MLM) will host its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 earnings conference call on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The company will release results for the quarter and year ended December 31, 2025, before market open that morning. A live webcast and supplemental materials will be available on the company's investor website, and an on-demand replay will be available for one year.

feed.title: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) Sets New 52-Week High After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) reached a new 52-week high after Royal Bank of Canada upgraded its rating to "outperform" and raised its price target to $35. Despite this, analysts remain divided, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $26.36. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with $0.61 EPS, and pays an annualized dividend of $0.84, yielding approximately 2.9%.

feed.title: OUTFRONT Media To Report 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results on February 25, 2026
feed.summary: OUTFRONT Media Inc. (NYSE: OUT) has announced that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, after the market closes on Wednesday, February 25, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Both the earnings announcement and a webcast of the conference call will be accessible on the Investor Relations section of OUTFRONT's website.

feed.title: Edison International to Hold Conference Call on Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Edison International announced it will hold a conference call to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025. The call is scheduled for Wednesday, February 18, 2026, from 1:30-2:30 p.m. (PT) and will be accessible via phone and webcast. A replay will also be available for those unable to attend the live event.

feed.title: U.S. Markets Rose Wednesday; Moderna Led Increases
feed.summary: U.S. stock indexes advanced on Wednesday, with the S&P 500, Dow Jones Industrial Average, and Nasdaq Composite all posting gains of over 1%. Moderna (MRNA) led increases, contributing to the overall positive market performance.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Western Digital (WDC) surged by 9.3% following optimistic analyst reports, with Bank of America raising its price target to $257 and Rosenblatt Securities to $270. Analysts cited a stable pricing environment, strong data center spending, and increasing hard-disk drive prices as reasons for the positive outlook. This recent jump continues a trend of positive sentiment, with the stock setting a new 52-week high and being up 28.5% year-to-date.

feed.title: Paycom Software, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
feed.summary: Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) will release its fourth-quarter and year-ended Dec. 31, 2025 earnings after market close on February 11. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 5 p.m. Eastern to discuss the results, with dial-in and webcast information provided for participation and replay.

feed.title: Advisory for Wednesday, Feb. 18: Edison International to Hold Conference Call on Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE: EIX) will hold a conference call on Wednesday, Feb. 18, 2026, to discuss its Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results. The call will take place from 1:30-2:30 p.m. (PT) and will be accessible via phone numbers provided for U.S. and international callers, as well as through a webcast on www.edisoninvestor.com. A replay of the call will be available until March 4.

feed.title: Digital Realty Announces Tax Treatment of 2025 Dividends
feed.summary: Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR) has announced the tax treatment for its 2025 dividends, applicable to both common and preferred stock. The company detailed how its 2025 taxable dividend for common stock, totaling $4.88 per share, will be reported on Form 1099-DIV, with 79% as ordinary income and 21% as capital gain distribution. Similar breakdowns were provided for its Series J, K, and L Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stocks, along with important disclaimers advising shareholders to consult their tax advisors due to varying federal, state, and local tax laws.

feed.title: Coca-Cola Gained 1% Last Week. Here’s What’s Driving the Stock
feed.summary: Coca-Cola stock (KO) rose 1% last week, finishing near $72, without any specific company news driving the increase. TIKR's valuation model suggests the stock is slightly undervalued with a target price of $84, implying a 16.9% upside over 1.9 years. This valuation depends on Coca-Cola's ability to maintain pricing power, shift to higher-margin products, and manage input costs.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and ...
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson reported strong Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with significant revenue growth in both Innovative Medicine and MedTech segments. Key drivers included strong oncology and immunology sales, alongside a robust product pipeline. While facing headwinds from STELARA and talc litigation, the company remains confident in its ability to achieve double-digit revenue growth by the end of the decade through strategic focus on high-innovation markets and continued pipeline development.

feed.title: Rollins Inc stock hits all-time high at 63.54 USD
feed.summary: Rollins Inc. (ROL) stock has reached an all-time high of $63.54, reflecting a strong year with a 30.97% price increase and a 31.32% total return. The company, a pest control giant with a market capitalization of $30.5 billion, offers relatively low volatility (beta of 0.79) and has maintained dividend payments for 55 consecutive years. Despite a high P/E ratio of 59.5, analysts generally maintain a positive outlook, with several firms upgrading ratings and raising price targets due to the company's growth potential.

feed.title: Northern Trust Declares Quarterly Dividends on Common and Preferred Stock
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation (Nasdaq: NTRS) has announced quarterly cash dividends for both its common and preferred stock. A dividend of $0.80 per share will be paid on common stock on April 1, 2026, to shareholders of record by March 6, 2025. Additionally, dividends of $2,300 per share for Series D preferred stock and $293.75 per share for Series E preferred stock are payable on April 1, 2026, to holders of record by March 15, 2025.

feed.title: Northern Trust Declares Quarterly Dividends on Common and Preferred Stock
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation (Nasdaq: NTRS) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.80 per share on its common stock, payable on April 1, 2026, to holders of record on March 6, 2025. Additionally, the company declared cash dividends for its Series D and Series E non-cumulative perpetual preferred stocks, also payable on April 1, 2026. This announcement highlights Northern Trust's consistent return of value to its shareholders through dividends.

feed.title: Should You Buy CVS Health Stock Before Feb. 10?
feed.summary: CVS Health's stock had a volatile performance, surging 77% in 2025 after a 43% drop in 2024. The company is set to announce its Q4 earnings on February 10, which will be an important test for its performance this year. Despite its recent rally, CVS Health's valuation remains modest with a forward P/E of 11, making it an attractive option for long-term investors if its financial performance continues to improve.

feed.title: 10 Monthly Dividend REITs With High Yields
feed.summary: This article identifies 10 monthly dividend-paying REITs, ordered by dividend yield from lowest to highest, making them appealing for income investors. REITs offer a way to invest in real estate without direct landlord responsibilities and often provide higher and more frequent dividend payouts compared to other stock types. The featured REITs include STAG Industrial, Agree Realty, SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Realty Income, LTC Properties, EPR Properties, NorthWest Healthcare Properties, Healthpeak Properties, Slate Grocery REIT, and Modiv Industrial, each with a brief overview of their business and recent financial performance.

feed.title: Linde stock rises on Citi target lift as tariff fears ease ahead of Feb. 5 earnings
feed.summary: Linde plc (LIN) shares rose 1.7% to $440.45 after Citi increased its price target to $540 from $520, maintaining a Buy rating. The increase comes as fears of new tariffs eased after President Trump stepped back from previous threats. Linde is scheduled to release its Q4 2025 earnings on February 5th, with investors looking for volume trends and 2026 demand outlook.

feed.title: Canadian John Deere dealers merge
feed.summary: Greenvalley Equipment and Enns Brothers, two John Deere dealers in Manitoba, announced plans to merge their operations. This strategic combination aims to enhance customer service, expand employee opportunities, and support long-term investment in agricultural solutions across the province. The transaction is expected to close in April 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.

feed.title: Popular health company rebrands after Nasdaq delisting threat
feed.summary: KindlyMD, Inc., (now Nakamoto Inc.) a healthcare-turned-Bitcoin company, has rebranded to align with its long-term strategy in the Bitcoin ecosystem, despite facing a Nasdaq delisting threat due to its stock trading below $1. The company received a delisting notice on December 10, 2025, and has 180 calendar days to regain compliance. Nakamoto Inc. emphasizes its commitment to Bitcoin, holding over $500 million in its treasury, while its healthcare operations will continue under Kindly LLC.

feed.title: Dallas Stars, American Airlines Center, PNC Bank renew long-term partnership
feed.summary: The Dallas Stars and American Airlines Center have announced the renewal of their long-term partnership with PNC Bank, which began in 2020. This extended agreement solidifies PNC Bank as an Official Partner, retaining exclusive naming rights for PNC Plaza and continuing the commitment of all three organizations to enhancing fan and community experiences in North Texas. The partnership has facilitated notable events such as the unveiling of Mike Modano's statue and various fan-first activations, underscoring a shared focus on community investment and exceptional customer experience.

feed.title: Moody’s upgrades Gap’s outlook to positive, affirms Ba2 rating
feed.summary: Moody’s Ratings has upgraded Gap Inc.'s outlook from stable to positive while reaffirming its Ba2 corporate family rating. This change reflects Gap's improved operating performance and profitability, driven by successful branding, cost efficiencies, reduced promotional activity, and better inventory management. The debt-to-EBITDA ratio has significantly improved, and Moody's expects continued strong financial metrics, though a further upgrade would require consistent performance across all brands, sustained sales growth, and margin expansion.

feed.title: FFIV Stockholders Who Lost Money Investing in F5, Inc. Should Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is informing F5, Inc. (FFIV) stockholders about a class action lawsuit filed against the company. The lawsuit alleges that F5, Inc. misled investors by failing to disclose a significant security breach affecting its key offerings and BIG-IP product development, which subsequently impacted its financial performance. This news caused a substantial drop in F5's stock price, and shareholders who lost money are encouraged to contact Robbins LLP by February 17, 2026, to potentially serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Why Eli Lilly (LLY) Stock Is Up Today
feed.summary: Eli Lilly's stock saw a 3.5% jump after the FDA granted Breakthrough Therapy designation for its ovarian cancer drug, sofetabart mipitecan, indicating a potentially faster path to market. This positive news follows a recent dip in the stock due to a delayed FDA decision on its oral weight-loss pill. Despite this, Eli Lilly's shares are trading near their 52-week high, reflecting investor interest in its pipeline.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz are announcing an opportunity for shareholders of Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (ARE) who suffered losses to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that between January and October 2025, Alexandria overstated the value and stability of its Long Island City (LIC) property as a life-science destination and failed to disclose its declining value and occupancy. Investors have until January 26, 2026, to participate as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. (SFM) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
authors: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that investors who suffered losses with Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. (SFM) have an opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Sprouts made materially misleading statements between June 4, 2025, and October 29, 2025, regarding the resilience of its customer base, the impact of "trade-down" dynamics, and the accuracy of its comparable sales guidance, failing to disclose a significant slowdown in sales growth. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm by the January 26, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline to participate in the lawsuit.

feed.title: Smithfield Foods to acquire Nathan’s Famous hot dog brand for $450M
feed.summary: Smithfield Foods announced its acquisition of Nathan’s Famous Inc. hot dog brand for approximately $450 million. Smithfield, which has held an exclusive license to manufacture and distribute Nathan's Famous products since 2014, expects the deal to close in the first half of 2026. This acquisition aims to integrate Nathan's Famous fully into Smithfield's portfolio, enhancing growth opportunities and capitalizing on existing manufacturing, marketing, and distribution expertise.

feed.title: Judge Tosses Drug Pricing Conspiracy Case Against CVS, UnitedHealth, Evernorth
feed.summary: A federal judge has dismissed a class action lawsuit against CVS Health Corp., Evernorth Health Inc., and UnitedHealth Group Inc., which alleged a conspiracy to manipulate prescription drug prices. The court ruled that the plaintiffs failed to provide sufficient evidence of a coordinated antitrust violation by the companies. This decision marks a setback for those challenging the influence of vertically integrated health-care corporations on drug pricing.

feed.title: Why AMD’s stock is rocketing toward its longest winning streak in nearly a year
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock is experiencing its longest winning streak in almost a year due to increasing optimism for its central processing units (CPUs) used in AI data centers. Analysts, like KeyBanc's John Vinh, anticipate a revenue beat and higher guidance in AMD's upcoming fourth-quarter earnings report, driven particularly by strong demand for their server CPUs, including the latest Turin model. This positive sentiment underscores the company's expected benefit from the growing demand for server chips.

feed.title: Daily Coffee Report 1/21/26
feed.summary: This StoneX Daily Coffee Report for January 21, 2026, provides key market data for ICE Arabica, ICE Robusta, Brazil Arabica, and arbitrage spreads, with specific volume figures for each. It also includes contact information for StoneX Coffee Team offices in Miami, London, and Brazil. The report emphasizes that the content represents the opinions of the authors and is not individualized financial advice.

feed.title: Assessing MBX Biosciences (MBX) Valuation After Guggenheim’s Supportive Obesity Drug Updates
feed.summary: MBX Biosciences is experiencing renewed investor interest following supportive research updates from Guggenheim, highlighting its obesity drug pipeline and upcoming clinical milestones. The stock has seen significant short-term and annual gains, with its current valuation presenting a mixed signal: inexpensive compared to a peer group but expensive relative to the broader US pharmaceuticals industry based on its Price-to-Book ratio. Investors are advised to consider the clinical and execution risks associated with MBX's pipeline and its current unprofitability.

feed.title: Antofagasta's (ANTO) "Sector perform" Rating Reaffirmed at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada reaffirmed its "sector perform" rating for Antofagasta (LON:ANTO) with a price target of GBX 2,700, suggesting a potential downside of 24.9% from its current price. Despite this, other brokers are more optimistic, leading to a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of GBX 2,827.50. The mining company's shares recently traded at GBX 3,595 close to its 12-month high.

feed.title: Trustpilot Group (LON:TRST) Receives "Outperform" Rating from Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has reiterated an "Outperform" rating for Trustpilot Group (LON:TRST), setting a target price of GBX 290, which suggests a potential upside of 38.67% from its last close. Insider buying activity has been significant, with key executives purchasing over 254,000 shares in the past three months, now owning 17.92% of the company. The stock saw a jump in trading volume and value, indicating strong investor interest following the analyst's positive outlook.

feed.title: Dr. Reddy’s Publishes Audio Recording of Q3 FY2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories Ltd. has announced the public release of the audio recording from its Q3 FY2026 earnings call, which took place on January 21, 2026. This move, compliant with Indian listing regulations, is aimed at increasing transparency for investors and stakeholders by providing direct access to management's commentary on the company's performance and future outlook. The company is an India-based pharmaceutical firm listed on Indian exchanges and the NYSE.

feed.title: Old National Bancorp Reports Record Q4 2025 Earnings with Adjusted EPS of $0.62
feed.summary: Old National Bancorp reported record Q4 2025 earnings with an adjusted EPS of $0.62, a significant increase from previous periods, driven by strong profitability. The company anticipates 4% to 6% loan growth in 2026 and demonstrated improved efficiency with a record low adjusted efficiency ratio of 46%. Analysts forecast a moderate buy for ONB stock with an average 1-year price target of $26.29.

feed.title: EQT stock pops as natural gas surges on Arctic blast; what traders watch next
feed.summary: EQT shares surged over 6% following a rally in U.S. natural gas prices, driven by colder weather forecasts and short-covering. Other natural gas-linked stocks also saw gains, including Range Resources, Devon Energy, and Coterra Energy. Traders are now looking to Thursday’s U.S. natural gas storage report for further market insights, as global LNG supply is expected to increase in 2026.

feed.title: Raised EPS Guidance Amid Expected Q4 Slowdown Could Be A Game Changer For LKQ (LKQ)
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation reported a Q3 2025 earnings beat and raised its full-year adjusted EPS guidance, despite analysts forecasting a Q4 2025 earnings decline. This development has intensified focus on the company's earnings quality and future outlook, particularly given existing debt levels and recent share price pressure. The article suggests that while the raised guidance reinforces LKQ's investment case as a cash-generative auto parts distributor, the anticipated Q4 slowdown and other risks warrant careful consideration.

feed.title: D.R. Horton sales slip as buyers remain cautious
feed.summary: D.R. Horton reported a 9% decline in sales for the quarter ending December 30, signaling a broader housing market slowdown. The company's chief executive stated that incentives will continue to be offered to buyers despite the consequent squeeze on profit margins. This approach aims to address the current challenges in the housing industry.

feed.title: QQQX Vs. QQQI: The CEF Is Relatively More Attractive For Those OK With Some Complexity
feed.summary: The article compares Nuveen Nasdaq 100 Dynamic Overwrite Fund (QQQX) and a similar ETF, QQQI, both offering exposure to the Nasdaq 100 Index with call overwrite strategies. QQQX, a CEF, currently trades at an -8.22% NAV discount, providing potential upside for investors comfortable with its added complexity. QQQI offers a simpler ETF approach with a generally higher yield.

feed.title: Eaton (ETN) Evaluates Strategic Options for Vehicle Unit Worth Up to $5 Billion
feed.summary: Eaton (ETN) is exploring strategic options, including a potential sale or spinoff, for its vehicle unit, which could be valued at up to $5 billion. This move signals a shift towards high-growth businesses under the new CEO and has led to a positive reaction in Eaton's stock price. While discussions are ongoing, Eaton has not yet confirmed specific actions, indicating some uncertainty in the strategic decisions.
